observations.summary: The metaphor of words settling like stones dropped into still water parallels earlier imagery of stones and water as symbols of weight, impact, and sinking, reflecting the emotional or psychological effect of words on the character.

source_evidence.quote: The words settled into him like stones dropped into still water, sinking before he could stop them.

observations.target_hint: This echoes earlier narrative motifs where stones and water symbolize heaviness, impact, and descent, such as the image of a stone dropped into an endless well representing helplessness and falling into the Pit.

target_evidence.quote: He was a stone dropped into an endless well, a body giving up to the pull of an unseen, monstrous gravity.

accepted_observations.summary: The metaphor of words settling like stones dropped into still water parallels earlier imagery of stones and water as symbols of weight, impact, and sinking, reflecting the emotional or psychological effect of words on the character.
